notes: Body padding is 0px; main container uses 30px side padding and 88px bottom padding.
About content starts at x=180px; visible text column is 532px wide.
Text column right edge is x=712px; portrait starts at x=944px, leaving about 232px of horizontal pause.

grid.max_width: 1065px visible about band inside a 1425px page
grid.gutter: about 232px between the text column and portrait

taste.name: Whitespace Does the Framing
taste.trigger: When presenting the about section and personal proof on a long one-page portfolio
taste.decision: Chose a wide gray field with typography-led grouping over boxed modules, dividers, or dense cards
taste.reason: Because the reader should feel that the person can leave space around claims instead of filling every viewport with proof
evidence: Page background #dbdbdb and major surface #efefef dominate the screenshot
About text column is 532px wide while the visible band spans about 1065px
There is about 232px between the text column and the 270px portrait
No CSS grid was detected; section boundaries are created by whitespace and scroll distance

taste.name: Accent as Punctuation
taste.trigger: When the page needs personality and clear actions without turning the whole surface into a brand color field
taste.decision: Chose orange only for the word Creative, rating stars, and the primary call-to-action over broad orange backgrounds or multiple accent colors
taste.reason: Because one hot color is easier to trust when it behaves like an instruction mark instead of a decorative wash
evidence: Accent #e27500 appears on the 168px x 40px Schedule a call button and the Creative word
Secondary buttons keep #eaeaea backgrounds with 1px #333333 borders
DOM color counts show neutral surfaces #efefef, #eaeaea, and #ffffff far more often than solid #e27500

taste.name: Small Control, Large Presence
taste.trigger: When a long single-page portfolio still needs persistent navigation
taste.decision: Chose a 528px x 52px fixed bottom capsule over a full header bar or a large side menu
taste.reason: Because navigation can stay constantly reachable while the first read remains about the content, not the site chrome
evidence: Fixed nav wrapper is 528px x 52px at x=449px y=824px in a 1440px viewport
Nav labels are 15px with 21px line height
Home control is 42px x 40px and contact control is 118px x 42px

taste.name: Human Proof Over Abstract Decoration
taste.trigger: When establishing credibility for a designer-founder profile
taste.decision: Chose one real portrait plus client and review proof over abstract 3D objects, heavy textures, or ornamental illustrations
taste.reason: Because the reader needs to connect the work claims to a person and to external proof before exploring the portfolio
evidence: Only prominent first-viewport image is a 270px x 380px portrait with 24px radius
Portrait uses a single shadow: 0px 6px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)
Trust proof appears immediately below the CTAs as Trusted by over 130+ clients
Five social icons repeat as 39px x 39px boxes with 10px radius
